note: Captured from authenticated completed Badge Quiz review pages after user confirmed IBM team lead authorization to reproduce Badge Quiz content on 2026-05-21.

questions.prompt: Which TSO command is used to inform the system how you want to use your terminal?

Using the following information, what is the correct syntax of the TSO command to allocate a new PDS? User ID: IBM Data set name: BUILDS.SERVERS Block length: 100 bytes Logical record length: 80 Data control block size: 300 2 directory block Fixed block records

choices.text: ALLOC DA(BUILDS.SERVERS) DSORG(PDS) BLOCK(100) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(300) DIR(2) RECFM(F,B) NEW TRACKS SPACE(2,3)
ALLOC DA(BUILDS.SERVERS) DSORG(PDSE) BLOCK(100) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(300) DIR(2) RECFM(F,B) NEW TRACKS SPACE(2,3)
ALLOC DA(BUILDS.SERVERS) DSORG(PO) BLOCK(100) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(300) DIR(2) RECFM(F,B) NEW TRACKS SPACE(2,3)
ALLOC DA(IBM.BUILDS.SERVERS) DSORG(PO) BLOCK(100) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(300) DIR(2) RECFM(F,B) NEW TRACKS SPACE(2,3)

correctChoiceTexts: ALLOC DA(BUILDS.SERVERS) DSORG(PO) BLOCK(100) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(300) DIR(2) RECFM(F,B) NEW TRACKS SPACE(2,3)
questions.rightAnswer: ALLOC DA(BUILDS.SERVERS) DSORG(PO) BLOCK(100) LRECL(80) BLKSIZE(300) DIR(2) RECFM(F,B) NEW TRACKS SPACE(2,3)

questions.prompt: What is it called when you establish a link to a data set?
Which prefix line command copies data from specified columns of one or more source records to the corresponding columns of one or more existing records?
When in a data set on the edit panel, what is entered in the prefix area to move a block of lines?

choices.text: MM on the first line, MM on the last line, and F (following) or P (preceding) on the line where you want to move the lines to
MM on the first line, MM on the last line, and A (after) or B (before) on the line where you want to move the lines to
M on the first line, M on the last line, and F (following) or P (preceding) on the line where you want to move the lines to
M on the first line, M on the last line, and A (after) or B (before) on the line where you want to move the lines to

correctChoiceTexts: MM on the first line, MM on the last line, and A (after) or B (before) on the line where you want to move the lines to
questions.rightAnswer: MM on the first line, MM on the last line, and A (after) or B (before) on the line where you want to move the lines to

questions.prompt: What is the correct procedure to logoff TSO?

choices.text: Enter the word disconnect on Primary Option Menu
Enter the word logoff on the Primary Option Menu
After ending the ISPF session, enter disconnect

questions.prompt: In a list of datasets returned by ISPF dataset list function (3.4), which primary command locates and positions the cursor to the first dataset in the list starting with characters 'PROD':
When searching for a word in a data set, which function key can be used to locate the word again?
What are the two ways to end the ISPF session?

choices.text: Enter the word END on the command line of the ISPF Primary Option Menu or press the F12 (Cancel) key
Press the F3 (Exit) key and enter Logoff on the Primary Option Menu
Press the F12 (Cancel) key and enter Logoff on the Primary Option Menu
Enter the letter X on the command line of the ISPF Primary Option Menu or press the F12 (Cancel) key

correctChoiceTexts: Enter the letter X on the command line of the ISPF Primary Option Menu or press the F12 (Cancel) key
questions.rightAnswer: Enter the letter X on the command line of the ISPF Primary Option Menu or press the F12 (Cancel) key

questions.prompt: When in a data set on the edit panel, what is entered in the prefix area to add three more lines to enter data?
Given a data set name of "IBM.Z.MAINFRAME", what is the low level qualifier (LLQ)?
What is the correct syntax to replace all instances of the word mainframes to servers in a data set?
What is the correct syntax of the command to display the catalog alias entry associated with an HLQ of STUDENT?
What is the correct syntax of the TSO command to list the basic attributes of data set IBM.SURVEY.RESULTS?
What are the three methods of entering TSO commands?

choices.text: On the command option line of the Dialog panel, ISPF Primary Option Menu-Option 5, and from the command prompt
ISPF Primary Option Menu-Option 6, on the command option line of the ISPF panel, and from the command prompt
ISPF Primary Option Menu-Option 6, on the command option line of the Dialog panel, and from the command prompt
On the command option line of the ISPF panel, from the command prompt, and on the ISPF Primary Option Menu-Option 5

correctChoiceTexts: ISPF Primary Option Menu-Option 6, on the command option line of the ISPF panel, and from the command prompt
questions.rightAnswer: ISPF Primary Option Menu-Option 6, on the command option line of the ISPF panel, and from the command prompt

questions.prompt: What is a valid method of spelling and capitalizing your userid on the logon screen?: TSOID01 tsoid01 TSoid01
After ending ISPF, what is the current state of the TSO session?
Which TSO command will deallocate data sets no longer needed?
To repeat a search after locating a specific word or phrase, what is used to repeat the search without reentering the character string?
Which command in the prefix area will add six additional lines?
During the exercise, you were instructed to logon TSO. Which panel was displayed after successfully logging on?
Which type of data sets contain members?
What TSO command recovers waste space that was formerly occupied by deleted or updated members and is now available for use again?
Select the correct statement(s) regarding TSO commands:

choices.text: TSO commands contain positional and required operands
TSO commands can be entered from any ISPF screen
TSO commands are not case sensitive
TSO command HELP LISTDS ALL provides all information regarding the LISTDS command

correctChoiceTexts: TSO commands contain positional and required operands
TSO commands can be entered from any ISPF screen
TSO commands are not case sensitive
TSO command HELP LISTDS ALL provides all information regarding the LISTDS command
questions.rightAnswer: TSO commands are not case sensitive , TSO command HELP LISTDS ALL provides all information regarding the LISTDS command , TSO commands contain positional and required operands , TSO commands can be entered from any ISPF screen

questions.prompt: After successfully logging on to TSO, what is the correct action to perform when three asterisks (***) appear on the screen?
